text: I feel a mixture of anticipation and mindfulness. The first scene, with its sterile meeting room and glass walls, gives me a sense of waiting and potential—a place designed for ideas to be exchanged yet currently dormant. I am reminded of how spaces shape our thinking before anyone speaks. Stepping into the second scene, the vibrant wall and philosophical text catch my attention. Here, curiosity awakens within me; I am drawn by the invitation to reflect on how humans innovate and interact with their environments. The exhibit speaks of synthesis—human and nature, movement and stillness. I feel myself becoming both observer and participant in this ongoing dialogue.
